author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Solution: CPATH with relative=true resolves to absolute workspace path for the compat/ include dir. CFLAGS=-include signgam_compat.h force-includes the header. The cc crate picks up both env vars when building core-math-sys. Header has #if _WIN32 guard so it's a no-op on POSIX. All 48 test suites pass on Linux.
